title: stizolobium cylindrospermum
intro: Stizolobium cylindrospermum, also known as the cylindrical bean or cowitch, is a type of legume native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Stizolobium cylindrospermum are said to include the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a decoction or infusion, and it can also be applied topically to the skin as a paste or ointment.
